description: Replace stale ESLint and Prettier references with Biome on the install and dev-setup documentation pages.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace ESLint and Prettier references with Biome in install and dev-setup pages
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want the docs to correctly reference Biome (the project's actual linter/formatter) so that I follow the right tooling instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx line 167 says `# Biome lint check` instead of `# ESLint`
docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx line 157 references Biome instead of 'Prettier and ESLint'
docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx line 150 says `# Biome lint check` instead of `# ESLint`
docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx line 151 says `# Biome format check` instead of `# Prettier formatting check`
docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx line 157 references Biome instead of 'Prettier and ESLint on staged files via lint-staged'
lastUpdated frontmatter is updated to 2026-03-02 on both pages
No other content changes beyond the ESLint/Prettier → Biome replacements and lastUpdated updates
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
The OpenTabs project migrated from ESLint/Prettier to Biome (see commit e3cdc53e). Two docs pages still reference the old tooling:

1. docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx:
   - Line 167: `npm run lint          # ESLint` → `npm run lint          # Biome lint check`
   - Line 157: 'The pre-commit hook runs Prettier and ESLint on staged files via `lint-staged`.' → 'The pre-commit hook runs Biome on staged files via `lint-staged`.'

2. docs/content/docs/contributing/dev-setup.mdx:
   - Line 150: `npm run lint          # ESLint` → `npm run lint          # Biome lint check`
   - Line 151: `npm run format:check  # Prettier formatting check` → `npm run format:check  # Biome format check`
   - Line 157: 'The pre-commit hook runs Prettier and ESLint on staged files via `lint-staged`.' → 'The pre-commit hook runs Biome on staged files via `lint-staged`.'

Also update the `lastUpdated` frontmatter field to `2026-03-02` on both files. These are simple string replacements — no structural changes needed.
